Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​A>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
A - the type of the array
E - the type of elements in the array
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​A>
public abstract class AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>
extends AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​A>
implements ExtensibleArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>
An ExtensibleArrayValidator that does nothing. A validator that ignores all subsequent failures because they are guaranteed to fail and would add any value to the end-user. For example, an attempt was made to dereference null or cast the value to an incompatible type.
